name: next-game
title: Next Game
description: What to Play Next - Smart Game Picker
author: glct26

commands.name: index
commands.title: Play Next
commands.description: View game recommendations and start your next session

commands.name: manage-skipped
commands.title: Manage Skipped Games
commands.description: View and unskip games you have hidden from recommendations

preferences.name: customSteamPath
preferences.title: Custom Steam Path
preferences.description: Optional: Select your main Steam installation directory if it is not in the default location.

preferences.name: listLimit
preferences.title: Recommendation Limit
preferences.description: Number of games to show in the list.

preferences.name: useSteamClient
preferences.title: Open Steam pages in Steam client
preferences.label: Use Steam client instead of browser when available
preferences.description: If enabled, Steam links will open in the Steam desktop client (steam://). Falls back to browser if unavailable.

preferences.name: showOnlyInstalled
preferences.title: Library Visibility
preferences.label: Show Only Installed Games
preferences.description: Hide games not currently installed. (Requires Steam folder read permissions).

preferences.name: tasteTimeframe
preferences.title: Base Recommendations On
preferences.description: How far back should the algorithm look to determine your current taste?

preferences.name: modeFilter
preferences.title: Exclusion Filters
preferences.description: Hide games based on their supported modes.

preferences.name: maxAgeYears
preferences.title: Maximum Game Age
preferences.description: Hide games older than this many years. (e.g. 5). Leave empty for no limit.

preferences.name: blacklistedTags
preferences.title: Blacklisted Tags
preferences.description: Hide games containing these tags. Separate with commas (e.g., Anime, VR, Horror).

preferences.name: requireController
preferences.title: Hardware & Features
preferences.label: Require Controller Support
preferences.description: Only show games with partial or full controller support.

preferences.name: requireAchievements
preferences.title: Achievements
preferences.label: Require Steam Achievements
preferences.description: Only show games that have Steam Achievements.

preferences.name: hideFreeToPlay
preferences.title: Library Cleanup
preferences.label: Hide Free-to-Play Games
preferences.description: Hide games tagged as Free to Play.

preferences.name: vrFilter
preferences.title: VR Mode
preferences.description: Filter games based on Virtual Reality support.
